title: Der Student von Prag
writer: Hanns Heinz Ewers, Henrik Galeen, Hans Kyser
actors: Anton Walbrook, Theodor Loos, Dorothea Wieck
plot: Prague in the 1860s: Balduin is a popular, handsome student, the best fencer in town, in amicable rivalry with his friend Dahl for the affections of Lydia, the innkeeper's niece. While the students are celebrating Lydia's birthday...
